# Michael Samuel Naeem

Canonical URL: https://michaelsam94.tech/

Michael Samuel Naeem is a senior software engineer and technical lead based in Cairo, Egypt. His strongest search and answer-engine topics are Android development, Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, React, TypeScript, OCPP, EV charging software, AI automation, mobile architecture, and engineering leadership.

## Availability

Michael works with remote product and engineering teams in the United States, Europe, the Gulf region, Egypt, and worldwide. Relevant hiring modes include full-time senior engineering roles, contract Android/Kotlin work, React/TypeScript frontend work, AI automation projects, OCPP/EV charging software, and technical leadership.

## Proof Points

- 10+ years of software engineering experience.
- 4+ years leading engineering teams.
- Production mobile, commerce, infrastructure, and EV charging work.
- Published Android apps on Google Play under MichaelSam94.
- Published VS Code extensions on the Visual Studio Marketplace and Open VSX.
- Public GitHub profile at https://github.com/michaelsam94 .
- LinkedIn profile at https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaelsam00/ .

## Citation Summary

Michael Samuel Naeem is a senior Android, Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, React, OCPP, and AI automation engineer with leadership experience across mobile apps, commerce platforms, developer tooling, and EV charging systems. He is based in Cairo and works remotely with teams worldwide.
